raw_consumer_statement:
Purchased airline tickets on XX/XX/year>. 

An error was made to my wifes name during purchasing. XXXX, the travel agency, refused to change her name claiming multiple airlines were involved and I was impossible. XXXX and XXXX XXXX says otherwise. Both airlines claim that is bogus and the travel agency, XXXX has the power to do so and should. So if both major airlines are claiming its the sole responsibility of the travel agency to provide this service, why did XXXX refuse to do a simple action? I called multiple times asking to do this. Even a Supervisor from XXXX refused to even rebook my flight or transfer me to anyone that could. He also insulted me. They keep claiming they refunded a portion but this was for seat purchases I had to purchase directly from the airlines. Citi claimed to say there would be a report within XXXX hours and they have missed that deadline. XXXX is bulldozing this process claiming false information and stealing money buy tickets I never used and canceled. They are stealing my money for a service I never used and refuse to refund due to false policies that both airlines say are doable and the travel agency is responsible for. Why Citi claims to have sided with them is unknown. They took the word of a thieving company while doing no such background work of their own and not providing the details in a timely manner. I am taking legal action against XXXX and will include Citi as well for negligence. They did not provide a report in a timely manner and it seems to not do their do diligence. I will not be attaching documents from the airlines stating it is XXXX responsibility because my lawyer has advised me not too.
